matches.resultNote: Corrected knockout result: Morocco advanced on penalties after a 1-1 draw.

commentary.text: Prediction: Bruno. Bruno leads 45–37 with gd 16 vs 10 and gf 41 vs 30, so tiebreakers lean Bruno. Selected teams favor Bruno’s Morocco/Japan/Norway/Mexico against Sara’s Switzerland/Brazil/Egypt/South Korea; Bruno’s winner pick France market prob 0.3885 (Spain for Sara 0.2075). Winner-picks aren’t match points but help long-term upside. Risk: a slump in Bruno’s margin or a Spain upset reshapes semi/CSW paths. Comebac
